evals.prompt: Quick sustainability check on my website at example.com
evals.expected_output: Checks green hosting, basic WSG compliance, page weight, and code patterns.
assertions: Checks green hosting status for the domain
Reports page weight or transfer size

evals.prompt: check the sustainability of my local dev project at localhost:3000
evals.expected_output: Runs checks that work locally (WSG, code patterns, bundle size), skips or notes that green hosting check requires a public domain.
assertions: Notes that green hosting check cannot run on localhost
Still runs WSG and code pattern checks
Evaluates bundle size or transfer size if possible
Does not error out due to localhost limitation

evals.prompt: Run a sustainability check but only focus on images and media — we know the rest is fine.
evals.expected_output: Narrows the check to image optimization, lazy loading, modern formats, and media-related WSG guidelines.
assertions: Focuses on image and media sustainability checks
Checks for modern image formats (WebP, AVIF)
Verifies lazy loading is implemented for off-screen images
Evaluates image compression and responsive image usage
References relevant WSG guidelines for media optimization
